title: Add task summary data to `/api/hermes-os/summary`
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard summary includes task backlog and execution planning signals.
Blocked and approval-sensitive work is visible in dashboard data contracts.
Regeneration and dry-run actions expose inspectable outputs.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
